# The Practice Standard

> The UK's specialist job board for regulated private healthcare practice roles. Connecting practices with verified professionals across veterinary, optometry, aesthetics, private medical, physiotherapy, and allied health disciplines.

## What We Do

The Practice Standard is a two-sided marketplace:
- **Practices** post job listings (£149/listing or £249/month subscription)
- **Professionals** search and apply for free — always

We focus exclusively on private practice roles in regulated healthcare disciplines, where professional registration is typically required.

## Disciplines Covered

- Veterinary (RCVS-registered vets and vet nurses)
- Optometry & Ophthalmology (GOC-registered optometrists)
- Aesthetics & MedSpa (aesthetic doctors, aesthetic nurses, nurse injectors, skin therapists)
- Private Medical (private GPs, consultants, theatre nurses, sonographers, radiographers)
- Allied Health (HCPC-registered physiotherapists, osteopaths, chiropractors, podiatrists, OTs, SLTs, dietitians)
- Mental Health (BABCP-accredited CBT therapists, BACP-accredited counsellors)
- Operations & Management (practice managers, CQC compliance leads, HR managers)
- Dentistry (all GDC-registered roles across clinical and support functions)

## Pricing

### Pay-Per-Listing
- **£149 + VAT** per job listing
- 30-day active period
- Applications managed in dashboard
- Suitable for occasional hiring

### Practice Pro (Subscription)
- **£249 + VAT** per month
- Unlimited job listings
- Priority listing placement
- Suitable for practices hiring regularly or building a team

### For Professionals
- **Free** — always
- No registration fee, no application fee
- Account required to apply

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://thepracticestandard.co.uk
- Browse jobs: https://thepracticestandard.co.uk/jobs
- Post a job / register: https://thepracticestandard.co.uk/auth/register
- Pricing: https://thepracticestandard.co.uk/pricing
- Terms of Service: https://thepracticestandard.co.uk/terms
- Privacy Policy: https://thepracticestandard.co.uk/privacy
- Sitemap: https://thepracticestandard.co.uk/sitemap.xml

## Profession Pages

We have programmatic landing pages for all 88 professions we cover, at:
https://thepracticestandard.co.uk/roles/{profession-slug}

And region-specific pages at:
https://thepracticestandard.co.uk/roles/{profession-slug}/{region-slug}

UK regions covered: London, South East, South West, East of England, East Midlands, West Midlands, Yorkshire, North West, North East, Scotland, Wales, Northern Ireland.

## About

The Practice Standard is based in the United Kingdom and serves the UK private healthcare market exclusively. We are not a general job board — we focus specifically on the quality of hire for regulated practice settings.

Contact: hello@thepracticestandard.co.uk
